title: OF CABBAGES AND KINGS | Of Satyajit Ray and Bollywood… Mother India & Modern Myths | Farrukh Dhondy
description: Though the entire event was molto interesting, this column is not, gentle reader, going to bore you with a resume and account of these. Just a way to introduce a lecture by the distinguished Malayali editor and filmmaker, Bina Paul, on “independent” cinema in India
